title: Jiayi Liu
text:
Hi! I am a third-year Ph.D. student in Economics at Brown University.
My primary research interest lies at the intersection of applied microeconomics and behavioral economics, with a focus on topics in violence, healthcare, and media. My research is very topic-driven.
Please feel free to get in touch!

title: Does Media Coverage of Violence Affect Public Trust? Evidence from Violence against Doctors in China
text: This is my senior thesis. I identified the effect of media coverage of violent anti-doctor incidents on individuals’ trust in doctors by a staggered Difference-in-Differences strategy and examined the dynamic effects by an event-study design. I also explored a series of potential mechanisms through heterogeneity analysis.
